infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FocusFlow uses your camera to track your gaze during focus exercises and measure your attention.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FocusFlow needs access to your photo library to save achievements and progress.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FocusFlow uses the microphone for voice-based focus exercises.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: FocusFlow uses motion sensors to detect phone orientation during focus exercises.

plugins.cameraPermission: FocusFlow uses your camera to track your gaze during focus exercises.
